# DOK ROK Pharmaceuticals & Healthcare

DOK ROK is a German healthcare and life-science company focused on human medicine, pharmaceutical concepts, NutraMedicine, medical technology, quality management, research and education.

Primary language: German
English version: https://dokrok.com/en/
Blog: https://dokrok.com/blog/
English blog: https://dokrok.com/en/blog/
Contact: contact@dokrok.com
